pin_notes.0: Strapping pin, boot button, pull-up needed
pin_notes.2: Strapping pin, on-board LED on some boards
pin_notes.12: Strapping pin, must be LOW at boot for flash voltage
pin_notes.15: Strapping pin, must be HIGH at boot for debug output

timers.notes: Timer 0 often used by WiFi, prefer timers 1-3
